summary.rootCause: Real score.ts bug introduced by K34-A3 multi-room combined-capacity change, not expected drift.
summary.fix: Minimal: pass current p.room to getAllRoomIds so the primary room id reflects the *current* placement, not the stale slot.roomId stored in DB.

failuresBefore.title: SC1 cross-building consecutive delta
failuresBefore.diagnosis: After moving slot2 to room 100, getAllRoomIds returned [200] (slot.roomId) but p.room=100. The combinedCapacity loop 'if (rid===p.room) continue' did not skip 200 (since 200!=100), so room 200's capacity (100) was added on top of room 100's capacity (100), giving combined=200 instead of 100. With combined=200, 20/200=0.10 also triggers SC10 waste -1, masking the 0 baseline shift in delta accounting.

failuresBefore.title: MIN_PERT introduction: full vs delta consistency
failuresBefore.diagnosis: Same bug: cap default 50. After move to room 101, getAllRoomIds=[100] (slot.roomId) but p.room=101; 100!=101, so room 100's cap (50) was added, combined=100. 20/100=0.20 < 0.30 AND cap=100 >= 100 → waste -1 extra. fullSoftDelta -3 vs expected -2.

failuresBefore.title: HC1 room conflict introduction
failuresBefore.diagnosis: Same bug as A3: slot1 moved to room 200, getAllRoomIds returned [100] (stale slot.roomId), combined=50+50=100, 20/100=0.20 waste -1.

failuresBefore.title: SC10 delta: good 0.475 → tight 0.95
failuresBefore.diagnosis: Before state: p.room=200, getAllRoomIds=[200], 200==200 skip, combined=200, 95/200=0.475 → 0. After state: p.room=100, getAllRoomIds=[200] (stale slot.roomId), 200!=100, combined=100+100=200, 95/200=0.475 → 0. Both before and after yield 0, delta=0. Bug prevented tight detection in after state.

failuresBefore.title: SC10 delta: small in huge (20/120=0.17, waste) → small in normal (20/40=0.50, good)
failuresBefore.diagnosis: After state: p.room=40, getAllRoomIds=[120] (stale slot.roomId), 120!=40, combined=40+120=160, 20/160=0.125 AND cap=160 >= 100 → waste -1. Both before (-1) and after (-1) yield -1, delta=0. Should have been: after=0, before=-1, delta=+1.

rootCauseAnalysis.k34A3Change: commit bdf1bbe 'fix(score): use combined capacity for multi-room HC4/SC10' introduced getAllRoomIds(slot) returning [slot.roomId, ...additionalRoomIds] and combinedCapacity = room.capacity + sum(additionalRoomCaps).
rootCauseAnalysis.bug: getAllRoomIds used slot.roomId (DB-stored, stale after a move) as the primary id, but combinedCapacity's first term was 'room.capacity' where room = ctx.roomById.get(p.room) (current state room). When a slot was moved to a different room, p.room != slot.roomId, so the 'if (rid === p.room) continue' check did NOT skip the stale primary id, and its capacity was added twice: once as room.capacity, once as additionalRoom.capacity.
rootCauseAnalysis.scope: Affects HC4, SC10 (full + delta calculations), HC5, HC6 — every site that consumes getAllRoomIds. The bug was masked when slot was not moved (p.room == slot.roomId) or when no move occurs.
rootCauseAnalysis.k22CFailureManifestation: All 5 K22-C FAIL cases involved moving a slot to a different room. Slot.roomId remained the original; the delta calculation incorrectly included the old room's capacity in the new state.

files.change: Added optional second parameter 'currentRoomId'. When provided, used as the primary room id; otherwise falls back to slot.roomId (backward compatible).
Updated 4 call sites (HC4 line 442, HC5 line 460, HC6 line 601, SC10 line 744) to pass p.room as the second arg.

fix.approach: Minimal. The 'if (rid === p.room) continue' guard inside combinedCapacity loops is now unnecessary in the common case (since the first id IS p.room), but it remains a defensive guard for the case where p.room differs from primaryId (impossible after fix) and to handle the case where p.room appears again in additionalRooms (defensive de-dup).

validation.k22CA2: PASS — fullΔsoft=3 (SC1 +5 cleared, MIN_PERT -2 added), delta.soft=3 (matches full)
validation.k22CJ10: PASS — before count=0 sum=0, after count=1 sum=-2, SC10 component delta=-2 (expected -2)
validation.k22CJ11: PASS — before count=1 sum=-1, after count=0 sum=0, SC10 component delta=+1 (expected +1)
validation.k26K4C: 32/36 PASS — 4 FAIL are pre-existing (lint baseline 184/146 hard-coded in script vs current 191/154; auth 53/1 hard-coded vs current 60/62). K22-C, schema, score weights, HC6 penalty, K22 expected all unchanged per K26-K4C checks.
validation.authFoundation: 60/62 PASS — pre-existing ScheduleAdjustment ACTIVE count mismatch.
validation.prismaMigrateStatus: Database schema is up to date (10 migrations)
validation.diagnoseScript: scripts/diagnose-multi-room-k22-score-alignment-k34-a3d.ts confirms SC10 details now show primary room only (no double-counting)

multiRoomBehaviorPostFix.singleRoomSlotNoMove: getAllRoomIds returns [currentRoomId]. combinedCapacity = room.capacity. Identical to pre-K34-A3 behavior.
multiRoomBehaviorPostFix.multiRoomSlotNoMove: getAllRoomIds returns [currentRoomId, ...additionalRoomIds]. combinedCapacity = currentRoom.capacity + sum(additional). Identical to K34-A3 design intent.
multiRoomBehaviorPostFix.multiRoomSlotMoved: getAllRoomIds returns [newRoomId, ...additionalRoomIds]. combinedCapacity = newRoom.capacity + sum(additional). The moved slot keeps its additional rooms (course-configured), and the new primary is the moved-to room.

conclusion.readyForRealUse: Pending user browser confirmation of K34-A3C dashboard secondary-room filter; K22-C now passes 73/0/0/0, score.ts multi-room bug is fixed, no solver/expected drift.
